name: uyari-desktop
description: Uyari para macOS — notas IA de reuniones, captura botless

scripts.postinstall: /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Add :NSAudioCaptureUsageDescription string Uyari captures meeting audio to transcribe it.' node_modules/electron/dist/Electron.app/Contents/Info.plist 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.package: npm run build:helper && electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac --dir
